subject: fix(icons): add 180px Apple touch icon and resolve glow-props pattern gaps
body:
Add apple-touch-icon.png (180px) to icon generation script — Apple's
recommended size for iOS home screen. Update all HTML files to reference
the dedicated 180px icon instead of reusing the 192px PWA icon.

Mark DEBUG_SYSTEM and EVENT_BUS as N/A for this static portfolio repo.
Update gap matrix to reflect full compliance.

Tags: icons, pwa, documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-compliance
Semver: patch
